posts.community: Exicom Tele-Services: A Key Player in the Booming EV Sector
posts.text: Exicom now to have state sponsored competition, although it has the first movers advantage. mint – 17 Jul 26 BHEL to make India's first indigenous fast chargers for electric trucks and... BHEL enters a competitive market dominated by Indian companies Servotech and Exicom as well as global rivals Zurich-based ABB and the Indian arm of Taiwanese manufacturer Delta Electronics.

posts.text: Can be big oppertunity for tritium x.com RedboxGlobal India (@REDBOXINDIA) on X @REDBOXINDIA DELHI JUST BANNED NEW PETROL AND CNG TWO WHEELERS FROM 2028 AND MADE ELECTRIC CARS UNDER RS 30 LAKH TAX FREE. THE PETROL ERA IN INDIA'S CAPITAL IS OFFICIALLY ENDING.
